title: alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. lanceolatum
intro: Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. lanceolatum, commonly known as the water plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Alismataceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which are attributed to its high content of iridoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. lanceolatum include its ability to relieve edema, promote urination, and treat conditions such as hypertension and urinary tract infections. Alisma plantago-aquatica subsp. lanceolatum can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to support kidney and urinary system health.
